use_cases: Display real-time analog clock with smooth or tick-based second hand movement
Show time in specific timezones for global applications
Serve as a design element in landing pages or dashboards
Provide visual time representation in productivity or scheduling tools
ai_summary: A customizable analog clock component with support for multiple seconds display modes (smooth, tick1, tick2, highFreq) and timezone configuration. Renders hour, minute, and second hands using CSS transforms, updating in real-time. Designed as a minimal, flat-style timepiece suitable for dashboard widgets or decorative purposes.
